/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SoftClip_Standalone.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/SoftClip_Standalone.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_Standalone.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_Standalone.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_Standalone.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_Standalone.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_Standalone.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_Standalone.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_Standalone.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.cpp.o -o SoftClip_artefacts/Standalone/SoftClip  SoftClip_artefacts/libSoftClip_SharedCode.a /usr/lib/libfontconfig.so /usr/lib/libfreetype.so -lrt -ldl -lpthread
